date_notes: Oct 14 2025 ATA proposal to TEBA; Oct 16 government 'enhanced mediation' proposal; Oct 17 ATA Provincial Executive Council rejects it and Premier Smith signals back-to-work legislation the week of Oct 27. Source: ATA (R-ata-enhanced-mediation-2025). Corrects prior 'Oct 23' date.
title_en: ATA rejects government's enhanced-mediation proposal; back-to-work legislation signalled
title_fr: L'ATA rejette la proposition de médiation renforcée du gouvernement; une loi de retour au travail est annoncée
description_en: Eight days into the combined strike and lockout, the Alberta Teachers' Association presents a bargaining proposal to TEBA (Oct 14 2025). On Oct 16 the government puts forward an 'enhanced mediation' proposal; on Oct 17 the ATA's Provincial Executive Council rejects it, and Premier Smith states the government expects to introduce back-to-work legislation the week of Oct 27. The breakdown is the proximate trigger for the legislative response.

relations.note: Failed mediation directly precedes government legislative response.

verification_notes: Sourced to ATA (R-ata-enhanced-mediation-2025), published 2025-10-28. Dates corrected: Oct 14 ATA proposal / Oct 16 govt enhanced mediation / Oct 17 rejection + Smith legislation signal (prior 'Oct 23' was erroneous). Ready for verification sign-off.

update_log.change: Dates corrected to Oct 14/16/17 2025 and sourced to ATA (R-ata-enhanced-mediation-2025); prior 'Oct 23 Smith announcement' was erroneous.
